summary_short:
- Meta wants local compression while preserving premium reasoning
- 10k soft threshold policy enabled
- Thread-bound subagent spawning enabled
summary_full: A local memory worker handles summarization and memory-candidate extraction while premium model remains focused on final reasoning. Context compaction is triggered at 10k soft threshold and Discord thread-bound sessions are configured.

memory_candidates.text: Use lfm2 for low-latency local compression
